title: Governance Event
description: Schema defining the structure of a governance event within the Agent OS. Represents a factual record of an action, change, or decision without editorialization.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

actor.description: Identifier of the entity that triggered the event (human, agent, or system).

system.description: The system or subsystem where the event originated (e.g., orchestrator, Cody, Warp, Postgres, pipeline).

type.description: Classification of the event (e.g., file_change, governance_update, prompt_sent, task_completed).

repo.description: Repository name where the event occurred.

path.description: File or resource path related to the event.

payload.description: Structured details containing the event-specific data.

links.description: References to related events, processes, or tasks.

parent_event_id.description: ID of the parent event that triggered this one.

task_id.description: Task this event is associated with.
